sub_pixel_system.notes: RTS game - sub-pixel system not applicable to gameplay mechanics

tier_notes: Emperor: Battle for Dune is a real-time strategy game focused on base building, resource management, and unit control. The game does not feature character-driven physics, platforming mechanics, or movement parameters applicable to this framework. Player input controls army units and structures rather than direct character movement with gravity/jump physics. Movement parameters are not documented because they are not mechanically relevant to RTS gameplay.
sources_used: wikipedia - Emperor: Battle for Dune article
